items.title: Stokes, Atkinson omitted from second Test as Root steps up as interim captain
items.summary: England name Jofra Archer and Jordan Cox in rejigged squad after nightclub incident
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Lionel Messi caught in major data leak as passport details exposed at FIFA World Cup warm-up game
items.summary: Argentina's pre-World Cup game game was marred by a security oversight that leaked passport details of several players, including Lionel Messi.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Banned referee had links with 'terror organisations' - US official
items.summary: Somali referee Omar Artan was denied entry to the United States because of his "association with suspected members of terror organisations," says a US official.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
